message:
feat(vmap,ad): implement BatchTrace interpreter and fix ReduceWindow VJP

Add per-primitive batching rules for all 77 primitives (bd-21dn) enabling
O(1) vectorized vmap execution. Replace ReduceWindow VJP zero-placeholder
with real gradient scatter for sum/max/min reductions (bd-1d3e), verified
by finite difference tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
